spec_match.rationale: Perfect spec mapping. Verifies globalThis.QuotaExceededError prototype exposure and captures native prototype fields (quota, requested) upon native throw.

interactive.rationale: Very interactive. Users trigger actual localStorage exhaustion with customizable chunks, inspecting native prototype interfaces dynamically.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Excellent description of DOMException subclassing improvements.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes a robust support badge probing globalThis exposure, and handles cleanups gracefully via a clear button.

references.rationale: Includes proper W3C spec/PR and ChromeStatus entry reference links.

design_system.rationale: Fully styled in accordance with repository layout CSS guidelines.

summary: A high-fidelity demonstration of DOMException-derived QuotaExceededError. It exhaustively fills localStorage using customizable chunks until a native exception is thrown, captures all prototype readouts, displays class exposure badges, and offers cleanups.
